title: Pesticides consultations - Canada.ca
content:
## Pesticides consultations
Health Canada's Pesticides Regulatory Directorate consults with the public on all proposed major registration decisions, including new registrations, major new uses of a pesticide, re-evaluations and special reviews.
For each open consultation, you can learn more about the proposed decision, access a consultation statement that outlines the major findings of the evaluation and the proposed decision, and leave a comment that will be reviewed before the final decision is made. Final decisions are available on our decisions and updates page.
To search for a specific active ingredient enter it in the field labeled "Filter items" below.
